data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Microsoft leverages Azure for scalable cloud services.
data.technical_spec: Built on Azure with microservices architecture.

data.title: Global CDN
data.description: Content delivery network to enhance global site performance.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Azure CDN for content caching and delivery.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Adaptive web design ensuring compatibility across devices.
data.technical_spec: CSS media queries and flexible grid systems.

data.title: High Availability
data.description: Ensures uptime through redundant systems and failover strategies.
data.technical_spec: Load balancing and automatic failover in place.

data.title: Integrated Services
data.description: Synergy between Microsoft's services like Office 365 and Azure.
data.technical_spec: Inter-service API connections and single sign-on.
